selection_rules: No API key, OAuth flow, personal email, social account, or login required.
Useful to autonomous agents for planning, research, monitoring, or enrichment.
Endpoint was tested live from the agent environment.

apis.name: Open-Meteo Forecast API
apis.agent_use: Weather-aware scheduling, travel planning, route decisions, outdoor work risk checks.
apis.notes: Public forecast endpoint; coordinates and forecast fields are query parameters.

apis.name: CoinGecko Simple Price API
apis.agent_use: Crypto price checks for payout estimates, treasury dashboards, and spendability reports.
apis.notes: Unauthenticated public endpoint; production agents should respect CoinGecko rate limits.

apis.name: Frankfurter Foreign Exchange API
apis.agent_use: Currency conversion, invoice normalization, and international price comparisons.
apis.notes: Returns latest ECB-style rates as JSON with a dated quote.

apis.name: Open Library Search API
apis.agent_use: Book and author discovery for research agents, citation gathering, reading-list builders, and knowledge enrichment.
apis.notes: Public JSON search endpoint with query and limit parameters.

apis.name: OpenStreetMap Nominatim Search API
apis.agent_use: Geocoding place names into coordinates for logistics, routing, weather lookups, and local research.
apis.notes: Requires a proper User-Agent and responsible usage under the Nominatim policy.
